questions.question: How much of the year does the prohibition of gas leaf blowers last? What date in the year does it start, and what date does it end?
What are the permitted hours for gas leaf blower operation?
questions.answer: Gas leaf blowers may be operated between the hours of 8:00 a.m. and 8:00 p.m., prevailing time, Monday through Friday, and between 8:00 p.m. and 9:00 a.m. on Saturdays, Sundays, and any federal holidays.

questions.question: What are the penalties for violating gas leaf blower regulations?
questions.answer: Any person violating the provisions of the gas leaf blower regulations shall be punished by a fine of not less than $100 nor more than $250. Each day that a violation continues constitutes a separate offense.
